description: On-premises SharePoint intranet published via Entra Application Proxy — no inbound firewall rules required.

_notes.pre_authentication_method: aadPreAuthentication enforces Entra auth before the request reaches the on-prem server. Use 'passthrough' only for apps that cannot handle redirects.
_notes.connector_group_name: Connector group must already exist in Entra and have at least one healthy connector agent installed on an on-prem Windows Server.
_notes.internal_url: Must be reachable from the Windows Server running the connector agent.
